commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Baldness, the sign of mourning, (Calmet) or captivity. (Haydock)
Peace. Hebrew, "shall be destroyed. "Septuagint, "cast away. "She has afforded no assistance to Gaza. (Haydock)
Valley, along the Mediterranean. (Calmet)
Literally, "And ye remnants of their valley, how? "
Cut, in despair or grief, chap. xli. 5. Septuagint, "Remnants of the Enakeim, (giants) how long wilt thou make incisions? "(Haydock)
The race of Enack dwelt in those parts; though ánkim seems to have been mistaken for ankom. (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
